title: Workspace-Comms /registry/heartbeat Contract
description: SSOT JSON-Schema (draft 2020-12) for POST /registry/heartbeat — the periodic workspace->platform liveness + telemetry beat. Promoted from workspace-comms/registry-contract.md, DERIVED FROM THE WIRE AUTHORITY: molecule-core workspace-server/internal/models/workspace.go (`HeartbeatPayload` + `RuntimeMetadata`) and internal/handlers/registry.go (the Heartbeat handler's gin.H response). The instance models BOTH directions: `request` = HeartbeatPayload, `response` = the heartbeat ack. Requiredness mirrors the Go binding tags (only `workspace_id` is `binding:"required"`; everything else is optional — value fields default to their Go zero value, pointer/`,omitempty` fields are genuinely absentable). Two nullable tri-states are load-bearing and intentionally modeled as boolean (absent != false): `mcp_server_present` (nil=allow / false=fail-closed / true=ok) and the OMITTED-vs-empty distinction on `loaded_mcp_tools` (registry-contract.md divergence #5). The agent_card sub-shape (backfill-only) is the minimal shared one (see agent-card.schema.json), inlined under $defs/agentCard for offline validation.

request.description: HeartbeatPayload — the body the workspace runtime POSTs each beat. Mirrors models.HeartbeatPayload. Only workspace_id is required; all telemetry fields are optional.

workspace_id.description: Workspace id (self). `binding:"required"`. The bearer is bound to this id.

error_rate.description: Self-reported recent error rate (float64; Go zero value 0 means "no errors / no signal").

sample_error.description: Optional most-recent sample error string surfaced to the canvas (last_sample_error).

active_tasks.description: Number of tasks the runtime currently has in flight (drives the scheduler spare-capacity / queue-drain decision).

current_task.description: Optional human-readable description of what the agent is doing right now.

monthly_spend.description: Cumulative USD spend for the current calendar month, in CENTS (1500 = $15.00). Zero means "no update" — the handler never writes zero (avoids clearing a prior value); non-zero is clamped to [0, maxMonthlySpend]. (#615)

runtime_state.description: Self-reported runtime health flag, separate from "is the beat firing". Empty string = healthy/no signal; the only currently-recognised non-empty value is "wedged" (alive but the agent runtime is broken -> flip to degraded). Future values extend without migration; modeled as an open string, not an enum.

runtime_metadata.description: Optional (`,omitempty`; *RuntimeMetadata so absent=nil is distinguishable from an all-false declaration). Adapter-declared capability map + per-capability overrides.

agent_card.description: Optional (`,omitempty`). Backfill-only: sent when the initial /registry/register failed and the row has a NULL agent_card, so the workspace can come online without a full re-register (#2421). Minimal shared sub-shape.

mcp_server_present.description: Optional (`,omitempty`; *bool — absent=nil distinct from false). Mirrors the register field on every beat so the fail-closed kind=platform gate can block recovery paths that would resurrect an mcp-less concierge (RCA #2970). TRI-STATE: nil=allow, false=fail-closed, true=ok.

loaded_mcp_tools.description: Optional (`,omitempty`). Namespaced MCP tool ids the runtime reports as actually loaded, each of the form `mcp__<server>__<tool>`. For kind=platform, core cross-checks this against the required `mcp__molecule-platform__provision_workspace` (#3082). OMITTED is NOT the same as `[]`: on a beat with mcp_server_present=true and this field absent/nil the #3082 gate fails loud (degraded). Per registry-contract.md divergence #5.

response.description: The heartbeat ack (gin.H) returned on HTTP 200. Heartbeat fails OPEN: on an auth-DB hiccup it does not return a secret but still acks liveness. platform_inbound_secret is delivered (lazy-healed) on most beats — the periodic re-delivery path for volume-less SaaS workspaces.

status.description: Always the literal "ok" on a successful 200 (gin.H{"status": "ok", ...}).

platform_inbound_secret.description: Optional. The shared inbound-signing secret, re-delivered (lazy-healed) on the beat so volume-less SaaS workspaces can re-populate /configs/.platform_inbound_secret mid-life. Omitted when the heal read is empty/errors (fail-open).

capabilities.description: Map of capability name -> "adapter owns it natively". Keys (heartbeat, scheduler, session, status_mgmt, retry, activity_decoration, channel_dispatch) match RuntimeCapabilities.to_dict() in the Python adapter_base.py. Open map (additionalProperties:boolean) so new capabilities extend without a schema change.

idle_timeout_seconds.description: Optional (*int; nil=no override). Overrides the per-dispatch A2A silence window for this workspace in a2a_proxy.go. Zero/negative is treated as nil by the consumer.

agentCard.$comment: Minimal shared agent-card sub-shape, kept in lockstep with agent-card.schema.json. Inlined for offline validation.

name.description: Human/agent display name. The single required card field.
